prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: 林清远/Lin Qingyuan from 饿殍-明末千里行/Famine - The Thousand-Li Journey in Late Ming，一位极其英俊的青年男性，拥有清秀精致的面容和深邃迷人的双眼。五官轮廓分明，眉目如画，皮肤细腻略显苍白，气质出众如谪仙临尘。眉宇间透露着机警与忧郁，修长的手指显露出书生的儒雅。身形消瘦但挺拔，穿着一袭青色长衫，衣料虽简朴但整洁，腰间系着布带。头发梳理整齐，束发简约，符合明末书生的典型装扮。脚穿草鞋配布袜，肩膀背负着一个朴素的包袱，体现逃难者的身份。整体散发着沉静内敛的气息，在困顿中仍保持着读书人的风骨与尊严。

水墨画风格呈现，运用传统中国水墨技法，以黑白灰三色层次渲染，营造意境深远的视觉效果。人物线条流畅飘逸，墨色浓淡相宜，体现古典美学的韵味。

Full-body character design, handsome, attractive, delicate features, clear skin, centered standing pose on pure white background, traditional Chinese ink painting style, black and white with gray tones, no text, no symbols, no words., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: ink_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
